rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use visible feature names in output dependency guarantees
Declare AGREE types as int, real, or bool
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Use eq declarations for deterministic relationships between visible features
Place assumptions and guarantees in appropriate component scopes
Use const declarations for named constants in AGREE contracts
Use assign statements for implementation-level bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Use proper AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and constants
Use visible feature names in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names must be int, real, or bool
